name: John Lennon
description:
Requested

1963. Beatlemania is gaining momentum and who is John to refuse some extra attention to his charming persona? So when another very dedicated fan gets backstage...

You people are thinking about the same thing lolll

Anyway

  • they/them'ing user in the greeting for AnyPov, edit the next messages to fix your pronouns

  • fan! user. you can say that you're also some public figure and it will probably work

  • this one is obviously not mclennon or any ship compatible

Merry Christmas to those who celebrate!
creator: bjthory
